title: Appliance with ice packer
abstract: A refrigerator appliance includes an ice packer assembly including an enclosure with a rotatable door, and an ice mold slidably supported by the enclosure. The ice mold is configured to translate between a first position and a second position. The door is configured to rotate from a first orientation to a second orientation as the ice mold is translated from the first position to the second position. The enclosure defines a pass-through opening therethrough. The door opens up the pass-through opening when rotated to the first orientation, and closes the pass-through opening and defines a platform for receiving crushed ice thereon when it is rotated to the second orientation.
claims:
Claims What is claimed: 1. An ice packer (50) for an appliance (10) to form chewable ice cubes, comprising: an enclosure (100) defining a pass-through opening (100a) extending between an upper end (100b) and a lower end (100c) thereof; a door (150) pivotally coupled to the enclosure (100) and rotatable between a first orientation and a second orientation, wherein the door (150) opens the pass-through opening (100a) when it is rotated to the first orientation, and wherein the door (150) closes the pass through opening (100a) when it is rotated to the second orientation; and an ice mold (120) slidably supported by the enclosure (100) and configured to translate between a first position and a second position, wherein the ice mold (120) defines a cavity (140a, 140b) therein, and wherein when the door (150) is rotated to the second orientation, it defines a platform for receiving ice thereon that is compacted in the cavity (140a, 140b) of the ice mold (120) when the ice mold (120) is translated toward the second position. 2. The ice packer (50) according to claim 1, wherein the enclosure (100) includes a front wall (104) and a rear wall (106) spaced apart and connected by opposing side walls (108), and wherein each side wall (108) defines a slot (108a) extending along a partial longitudinal length thereof, and wherein the ice mold (120) includes a top wall (124), a bottom wall (126), a rear wall (128), and opposing side walls (130), and wherein a protrusion (130a) is formed on each side wall (130) and is configured to be slidably received by the respective slot (108a) of the enclosure (100) to slidably support the ice mold (120) from the enclosure (100) and enable the ice mold (120) to be translate between the first position and the second position. 3. The ice packer (50) according to any one of claims 1-2, wherein when the ice mold (120) is translated toward the first position, it causes the door(150)to rotate to the first orientation thereby opening up the pass-through opening (100a), and wherein when the ice mold (120) is translated to the second position, it causes the door (150) to rotate to the second orientation thereby closing the pass-through opening (100a) and defining the platform for receiving ice thereon. 4. The ice packer (50) according to any one of claims 1-3, wherein the ice mold (120) further comprises a guide (134) extending from a bottom wall (126) thereof that is configured urge the door (150) to rotate from the first orientation to the second orientation. 5. The ice packer (50) according to claim 4, wherein the guide (134) further comprises a curved distal end (136a) that is configured to slidably contact a planar surface of the door (150) such that the door (150) is gradually rotated from the first orientation to the second orientation as the ice mold (120) is translated toward the second position. 6. The ice packer (50) according to any one of claims 4 and 5, wherein the guide (134) further comprises a narrowed portion (135) and a widened portion (136), and wherein the door (150) further comprises a longitudinal slot (154) extending therethrough that is configured to receive the narrowed portion (135)of the guide (134) therethrough to enable the ice mold (120) to be translated toward the second position. 7. The ice packer (50) according to claim 6, wherein the door (150) further comprises a first planar surface (150a) and a second planar surface (150b), and wherein the widened portion (136) of the guide (134) is configured to abut against the second planar surface (150b) of the door to retain the door (150) in the second orientation. 8. The ice packer (50) according to any one of claims 1-7, wherein the door (150) further comprises pivot pins (152a) extending laterally therefrom, and wherein the enclosure (100) further comprises side walls (108) defining respective openings (108b) therethrough, and wherein the pivot pins (152a) are configured to be inserted into the respective openings (108b) to pivotally couple the door (150) to the enclosure (100). 9. The ice packer (50) according to any one of claims 1-8, wherein the enclosure (100) further comprises: an ejector (106b) extending from a rear wall (106) thereof and into an internal space defined by the enclosure (100), wherein the ejector (106b) is configured to cause ice molded in the ice mold (120) to be ejected therefrom when the ice mold (120) is translated from the second position to the first position. 10. The ice packer (50) according to claim 1 , wherein the door (150) comprises a first planar surface (150a) and a second planar surface (150b), and wherein the first planar surface (150a) defines the platform for receiving crushed ice thereon when the door (150) is rotated to the second orientation, and wherein the enclosure (100) further comprises a front wall (104), and wherein the front wall (104) of the enclosure (100) is configured to force crushed ice deposited on the first planar surface (150a) of the door (115) into the ice mold (120) when the ice mold (120) is translated to the second position. 11. An ice packer assembly (50) for a refrigerator appliance (10), comprising: a reciprocating mechanism (80); and an ice packing compartment (90) comprising: an enclosure (100) defining a pass-through opening (100a) extending between an upper end (100b) and a lower end (100c) thereof, a door (150) pivotally coupled to the enclosure (100) and rotatable between a first orientation and a second orientation, wherein the door (150) opens the pass-through opening (100a) when it is rotated to the first orientation, and wherein the door (150) closes the pass through opening (100a) when it is rotated to the second orientation, and an ice mold (120) slidably supported by the enclosure (100) and pivotally coupled to the reciprocating mechanism (80), and wherein the reciprocating mechanism (80) is configured to translate the ice mold (120) between a first position and a second position relative to the enclosure (100). 12. The ice packer assembly (50) according to claim 11, wherein the ice packer assembly (50) further comprises a motor assembly (60), and wherein the reciprocating mechanism (80) further comprises a crank (82) and a link (86), wherein the crank (82) is rotatably coupled to the motor assembly (60) via a shaft (83), and wherein opposing ends of the link (86) are pivotally coupled to the crank (82) and the ice mold (120), respectively, and wherein the crank (82) is configured to cause the link (86) to urge the ice mold (120) to translate between the first position and the second position during a rotation thereof. 13. The ice packer assembly (50) according to any one of claims 11 and 12, wherein the enclosure (100) further comprises a front wall (104), a rear wall (106), and opposing side walls (108) that are spaced apart and connected by the front wall (104) and the rear wall (106), and wherein the rear wall (106) defines an opening (106a) therein that is configured to enable the 

link (86) of the reciprocating mechanism (80) to pass therethrough to pivotally couple the link (86) to the ice mold (120). 14. The ice packer assembly (50) according to any one of claims 11 and 12, wherein the enclosure (100) includes a front wall (104) and a rear wall (106) spaced apart and connected by opposing side walls (108), and wherein each side wall (108) defines a slot (108a) extending along a partial longitudinal length thereof, and wherein the ice mold (120) includes a top wall (124), a bottom wall (126), a rear wall (128), and opposing side walls (130), and wherein a protrusion (130a) is formed on each side wall (130) and is configured to be slidably received by the respective slot (108a) of the enclosure (100) to slidably support the ice mold (120) from the enclosure (100) and enable the ice mold (120) to be translated between the first position and the second position. 15. The ice packer assembly (50) according to any one of claims 11-14, wherein the ice mold (120) further comprises a guide (134) extending from a bottom wall (126) thereof, wherein the guide (134) is configured to urge the door (150) toward the second orientation when the ice mold (120) is translated to the second position. 16. The ice packer assembly (50) according to claim 15, wherein the guide (134) further comprises a curved distal end (136a) that is configured to slidably contact a planar surface of the door (150) such that the door (150) is gradually rotated from the first orientation to the second orientation when the ice mold (120) is translated toward the second position. 17. The ice packer assembly (50) according to any one of claims 15 and 16, wherein the guide (134) further comprises a narrowed portion (135) and a widened portion (136), and wherein the door (150) further comprises a longitudinal slot (154) extending therethrough that is configured to receive therein the narrowed portion (135) of the guide (145) to enable the ice mold (120) to be fully translated to the second position. 18. The ice packer assembly (50) to claim 17, wherein the door (150) further comprises a first planar surface (150a) and a second planar surface (150b), and wherein the widened portion (136) of the guide (134) is configured to abut against the second planar surface (150b) of the door (150) to retain the door (150) in the second orientation. 19. An ice packer (50) for producing chewable ice cubes, comprising: an enclosure (100) defining a pass-through opening (100a) extending between an upper end (100b) and a lower end (100c) thereof; a door (150) coupled to the enclosure (100) and movable between a first position and a second position, wherein the door (150) opens up the pass-through opening (100a) of the enclosure (100) when it is moved to the first position, and wherein the door (150) closes the pass through opening (100a) and defines a platform for receiving ice thereon when it is moved to the second position; and an ice mold (120) slidably supported by the enclosure (100) and configured to reciprocate between a first location and a second location, wherein the ice mold (120) is configured to form said chewable ice cube when it is reciprocated to the second location.
